release_notes: 修正 embeddable Python 下 launcher.py/cli.py 找不到 src 套件的問題
changes: 修復 embeddable Python 啟動時,launcher.py 與 cli.py 因 safe_path=1 不會自動將專案根目錄加入 sys.path,導致 ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'src'
修復 install.bat 改用 embeddable zip 後,python._pth 被寫入 UTF-8 BOM,造成 python.exe 啟動失敗

en: Fix ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'src' when launching under the embeddable Python — launcher.py and cli.py now explicitly put the project root on sys.path (embeddable's ._pth sets safe_path=1 which suppresses the default script-dir entry)
Fix install.bat writing a UTF-8 BOM into python._pth which broke python.exe startup with 'ModuleNotFoundError: No module named encodings'
zh-TW: 修復 embeddable Python 啟動時,launcher.py 與 cli.py 因 safe_path=1 不會自動將專案根目錄加入 sys.path,導致 ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'src'
修復 install.bat 改用 embeddable zip 後,python._pth 被寫入 UTF-8 BOM,造成 python.exe 啟動失敗
